name: State of Israel Section for Expo 2027 (Commissioner's office)

contact.person: Yahel Vilan (Commissioner, former Ambassador to Serbia)

outreach.notes: Israel's section commissioner — agreement signed ~1 Feb 2026. Vilan is a former Ambassador to Serbia (backed the Expo bid) — likely reachable via the Israeli Embassy in Belgrade. No email published. Source (A): expobelgrade2027.org news.
